item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes README Buggy choke Close guard overhook stiff Two grip choke on turtle Crusifix Baseball choke Collar grip break downward Cross collar grip break to takedown Grip break on upper back Neck related Side shimmy practice S grip Leg drag Double ankle grab pass Toreando Closed guard standin...

item.title: Headquarters
item.description: Description A strange sitting position on opponents waist that prevents them effectively from moving their waist or legs.

item.title: Knee slide
item.description: Hold opponents knee. Move opponents leg to the floor and step over it with your own opposing knee.

item.title: De La Riva and Reverse De La Riva
BJJ journey
item.description: Author I am a 34 year old white belt, who started 08/2023.
